title: lupinus subvexus var. transmontanus
intro: Lupinus subvexus var. transmontanus, also known as Transmontane Subalpine Lupine, is a perennial plant species within the lupine family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its high concentration of alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Lupinus subvexus var. transmontanus include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against cell damage. Traditional herbal preparations of Lupinus subvexus var. transmontanus include making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves and roots, which are often used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
